title: The Escape Narrows Around the Sunny
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Chiffon, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Oven as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't some sibling quarrel or rebellious phase of mine,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In a nutiny that sought to kill our queen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never thought I'd have to use my own hands to deal with my sister, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An example must be made. This is our country!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Crap... I don't think I can ponder this much longer!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: Get your hands off of Chiffon, Oven!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought we set you adrift on the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll just do this so fast that no one will be able to see me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That way I can still save him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh... I guess I was stronger than I thought?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh? Did that man just wallop Lord oven?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who the hell even is that old guy, anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's no way you did that!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 27 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
